title: Advanced RL Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced RL Techniques inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Meta Reinforcement Learning
steps.summary: A framework for reinforcement learning that involves learning to learn It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques. Start after Q-Learning and Reinforcement Learning Algorithms. It opens into Deep Reinforcement Meta-Learning and Cognitive Meta-Reinforcement Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: A foundational concept in Advanced RL Techniques — start here to build vocabulary and core intuition before moving to techniques and extensions.

steps.title: Ape-X DQN
steps.summary: Ape-X DQN belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced RL Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques. Compare it with Rainbow DQN and Noisy DQN.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Advanced RL Techniques. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Atari DQN
steps.summary: Atari DQN belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced RL Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques. Compare it with Rainbow DQN and Noisy DQN.

steps.title: Bootstrap DQN

steps.title: Bootstrap DQN (Deep Q-Network)
steps.summary: Bootstrap DQN (Deep Q-Network) belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced RL Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques. Start after Bootstrap DQN and Deep Q-Network (DQN).

steps.title: Deep Q-Learning
steps.summary: Deep Q-Learning belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced RL Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques. Start after Q-Learning and Deep Q-Network. It opens into Deep Kernel Learning and Deep Mutual Learning.

steps.title: Deep Q-Learning (DQN)
